openFindings.title: Traceability parent chain still points at the retired `010-search-and-routing-tuning` slug
openFindings.description: The canonical parentChain still records 010-search-and-routing-tuning even though the migration block records the new packet path under 001-search-and-routing-tuning.

openFindings.title: Packet-local research citations no longer resolve after the packet migration
openFindings.description: The plan, tasks, and decision record still cite ../research/research.md, but the current packet subtree has no sibling research/research.md.

openFindings.title: Traceability claim in the checklist overstates the implementation evidence
openFindings.description: The checklist says the implementation record cites specific research lines, but the implementation summary contains no such citation.

openFindings.title: Decision record lifecycle status is stale after completion
openFindings.description: The decision record still declares status: planned even though the packet is otherwise complete.

openFindings.title: Implementation summary verification count drifted from the live targeted suite
openFindings.description: The packet records 22 tests for the targeted Vitest run, but the current targeted suite reports 23 passing tests.

openFindings.title: Traceability metadata still advertises the pre-decision `4-5` ambiguity
openFindings.description: The packet is complete and the decision record locked the shipped cutoff to 4, but generated key topics still include 4-5.
